label: 存储卡异常
pattern: (?i)(mmc det failed during system startup|mmc0: error(?: -?(?:145|159|110))?|mmc1: error -110 whilst initialising sd card|hal sdmmc sendcmdandwaitprocess|\[sdmmc 1\] err)

label: 内核环境损坏
pattern: (?i)(can't get kernel image|warning - bad crc, using default environment)

label: WiFi驱动异常
pattern: (?i)(plat\s*soc:.*(?:elhcc|hcc) reinit failed|plat_soc:e\]wifi_power_on_fail|plat_soc:e\]hcc reinit failed|open /dev/atbm_ioctl fail|cannotsend cmd dataerror=|wait wifi init)

label: WiFi HCC异常
pattern: (?i)(hcc tx buf que is full|free buf error|hcc invalid pkt_len|trace: ba_push|discard it|\[wifi-hcc\].*host timeout)

label: 主控WiFi通信异常
pattern: (?i)(wait result timeout|get battery info failed|mcu get battery level result: -3|wifi_module_get_battery_info fail|hcc send rx data\(0x2c\) to host timeout|\[0\.u\] buffer full)

label: 蓝牙异常
pattern: (?i)(pm ble open failed|ble hwbt filenode open fail|\[ble\]:not connected|wifi_module_ble_stop fail|e:ble\?w\?wait\?timeout)

label: WiFi扫描失败
pattern: (?i)(wpa_scan fail|aich wifi sta scan failed|e:wifi_ctrl_thr: aich_wifi_sta_scan failed|aich_wifi_sta_scan_results failed|wifi_module_get_aplist fail|gz_api_process_thread ap list count: 0, result: -3|get wifi list ret:-3)

label: OTA下载失败
pattern: (?i)(download finish result -15|downlaod file fail:-15|wifi update result[:：]-1)

label: 视频抓取失败
pattern: (?i)(gz_hal_video_catchyuv.*(?:imp_framesource_getframe failed: ffffffff|ax_ivps_getchnframe failed: 800d0120)|gz_video_input_catch_yuv capture yuv error: -1|catch jpeg fail|catch panorama jpeg fail)

label: I2C通信异常
pattern: (?i)(electricity meter type:-1|err:aich i2c_write failed|hal_i2c_bus_state timeout|hal_i2c_master_receive fail|memaddress:0x6 read fail)

label: 启动耗时异常
pattern: (?i)(times from system start exceed 20s|host startup time:[234])
